title: tephrosia calophylla
intro: Tephrosia calophylla, also known as the Heartleaf or Pitted Pea Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia calophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia calophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are typically consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
